channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Opinion Column Revisits E. Jean Carroll Case and Criticizes Trump's Continued Legal Challenges
item.description: In this opinion piece, columnist Tara Dublin argues that Donald Trump continues to attack and defame writer E. Jean Carroll despite multiple court defeats related to Carroll's accusations of sexual ab...

item.title: Rachel Fitzgerald: Irish Aristocrat and Icon of 1950s Fashion
item.description: Rachel Fitzgerald (1933–1994) was an Irish aristocrat and model who epitomized elegance and sophistication in mid-20th century fashion. Born into the Anglo-Irish gentry at Glin Castle in County Limeri...

item.title: Family of murdered Southampton student Henry Nowak calls for stronger action on knife crime after killer is jailed
item.description: The family of 18-year-old university student Henry Nowak has spoken of their continuing grief following the sentencing of Vickrum Digwa, 23, for his murder in Southampton in December. Digwa was given ...

item.title: Zanzibar Allocates 53.39bn/- to Accelerate Digital Transformation and ICT Development in 2026/27
item.description: The Government of Zanzibar has presented a 53.39 billion shilling budget for the communication, information technology and innovation sector for the 2026/2027 financial year. The budget was tabled in ...

item.title: HBO Confirms 'Euphoria' Will Conclude With Season 3 Finale
item.description: HBO has officially confirmed that the hit drama series “Euphoria” will end with its third season, bringing the story to a close after seven years on air. The announcement was made by creator, writer, ...

item.title: Makashule Gana to lead parliamentary committee probing Ramaphosa over Phala Phala scandal
item.description: RISE Mzansi MP Makashule Gana has been elected as chairperson of Parliament’s Section 89 Impeachment Committee, which will assess whether President Cyril Ramaphosa should face impeachment linked to th...

item.title: AI adoption in Southern African newsrooms: efficiency gains with continued human editorial control
item.description: Artificial intelligence don quietly enter newsrooms across Southern Africa, especially for routine journalism work like transcription, headline writing, translation, summarisation, and content prepara...

item.title: CBN reassigns deputy governors to strengthen policy coordination and financial stability
item.description: Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) governor, Olayemi Cardoso, don carry out leadership reshuffle wey affect the four deputy governors, as part of effort to improve policy coordination and strengthen regula...

item.title: Ragnarok Console Project, a New Story-Driven RPG, Set for Multi-Platform Release in 2027
item.description: Publishers Gravity and Daweon Game Media Lab, alongside developer Waycoder, have officially announced Ragnarok Console Project, a new role-playing game set in the long-running Ragnarok universe. The g...

item.title: Powell Highlights Importance of Federal Reserve Independence Amid Political Pressure
item.description: In his first public remarks after finishing his term as Federal Reserve chair, Jerome Powell delivered a clear warning about the challenges facing the central bank. Speaking at the John F. Kennedy 'Pr...

item.title: Tanzania pastoral communities encouraged to use ICT to preserve cultural heritage
item.description: In Longido District, Tanzania, pastoral communities have been encouraged to adopt Information and Communication Technology (ICT) as a practical tool for preserving their cultural heritage, history, an...

item.title: Enugu State clarifies no attack occurred in Awgu, urges public to ignore fake reports
item.description: Enugu State Government don come out clear say di news wey dey circulate online wey claim say people don suffer attack for Awgu, Awgu Local Government Area, na pure lie. Malachy Agbo, wey be Commission...

item.title: Police investigate fatal stabbing of 19-year-old in KwaNonqaba, Mossel Bay
item.description: Western Cape police are investigating the fatal stabbing of 19-year-old Nhlamulo Sambo in KwaNonqaba, Mossel Bay, which occurred on Sunday, 31 May. According to police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chr...

item.title: Trump announces endorsements across six states ahead of key Tuesday primary elections
item.description: President Donald Trump issued a series of late-night endorsements ahead of Tuesday’s primary elections across six U.S. states: California, Iowa, Montana, New Jersey, New Mexico, and South Dakota. His ...

item.title: Trump criticizes political opponents and media in late-night Truth Social posts
item.description: President Donald Trump published a series of more than two dozen posts late Monday night on Truth Social, targeting a wide range of political opponents, media outlets, and public figures. According to...

item.title: A Retrospective of Frits Thaulow’s Impressionist Landscapes and Water Scenes
item.description: The article highlights the artistic legacy of Norwegian painter Frits Thaulow (1847–1906), widely regarded as one of the most influential figures in Scandinavian Impressionism. Known for his remarkabl...

item.title: Audience at Toronto Synagogue Highlights Omissions in Prime Minister Carney's Speech on Antisemitism
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney delivered a significant speech on antisemitism at Toronto’s Holy Blossom Temple, the oldest synagogue in Canada. The address, filled with references to biblical prophets, ph...

item.title: Israeli forces capture Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon amid renewed escalation
item.description: Israeli forces have captured Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon for the first time in 26 years, marking a symbolic and strategic moment in the renewed conflict between Israel and Hezbollah. The medie...

item.title: Pakistan calls on UN to strengthen mediation as key tool for preventing global conflicts amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Pakistan has urged the United Nations to make mediation the primary instrument of conflict prevention rather than treating it as a reactive tool used only after violence erupts. Speaking during a UN G...

item.title: Kellyanne Conway Urges Democrats to Distance Themselves From Maine Senate Candidate Graham Platner
item.description: Former Trump adviser Kellyanne Conway appeared on Sean Hannity's Fox News program and argued that Democratic candidates should publicly distance themselves from Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner. ...
